programme.title: Forbidden Science - Clone Fantasy
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Shots, Tim Harmsen heads to the heart of American gun craftsmanship with an exclusive, behind-the-scenes tour of Palmetto State Armory, where freedom is literally built on the production floor. From the anodizing line to live assembly, Tim witnesses American ingenuity in action as a rifle comes to life before his eyes. With the epic 10,000-Round Challenge complete, it’s time for some serious maintenance. The crew at SEAL 1 steps in with their cutting-edge nanotechnology to give the battle-worn BCM AK the deep clean it deserves. Once the guns are gleaming, it’s time to send rounds downrange. Teaming up with top firearms influencer Sootch, Tim takes aim at a new challenge, including a 1,000-yard Wild Shot that pushes precision, patience, and performance to the limit.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 1 - It Begins - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We collect the best poker streamers from Twitch.tv, as well as a few notable Vegas pros, to host our first ever Twitch Celebrity Cash Game. From a secret location in Las Vegas, NV we find out if the streamers can hang with the live players...or vise versa...featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 2 - Rampage - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Our exclusive Twitch Celebrity Cash Game is in full swing, and the only thing more outrageous than the personalities is the pot sizes. From a private residence living room in Las Vegas, NV, this is cash game poker at its most entertaining. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 3 - The Kissing Bet - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: The Twitch Celebrity Cash Game in Las Vegas barrels on into the night as our curated collection of Twitch streamers and Vegas pros swap chips and insults. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 4 - "Damn, Daniel!" - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: As word gets around Las Vegas that our cash game is in full swing, some notable players stop by and try and get in. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier.

programme.title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 5 - Psychic Flow - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: The poker from Las Vegas continues apace, and Phil Laak channels the psychic energy of the universal overmind to hone his poker play. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.desc: Three Midwest meteorologists break down an incredibly intense two-week weather pattern.
